results.rendered_html: khādi m. (f.?) a brooch, ring (worn on the hands or feet by the Maruts),  RV. i , v , vii  : (cf. vṛṣa-, hiraṇya-; su-khādi.)

results.rendered_html:
khādi m. Spange, Ring (am Arm und Fuss getragen); bei den Marut: aṃseṣvā vaḥ prapatheṣu khādayaḥ  ṚV. 1,166,9 . patsu khādayaḥ 5,54,11 . 7,56,13 . hasteṣu khādiśca kṛtiśca saṃ dadhe 1,168,3 . srakṣu rukmeṣu khādiṣu 5,53,4 .
— Vgl. vṛṣa˚, śudra˚, su˚, hiraṇya˚.
